_metadata.description: G.I. Joe Movies (2009-2021) — movie-original characters only. Returning characters (Duke, Snake Eyes, etc.) share ARAH slugs and get appearance records instead.

characters.name: Rex Lewis
characters.notes: Movieverse ORIGINAL character. Movie-original Cobra Commander identity. Baroness's brother, former soldier turned mad scientist 'The Doctor'. Played by Joseph Gordon-Levitt in Rise of Cobra (2009). No ARAH equivalent — ARAH Cobra Commander has different origin

characters.name: Akiko
characters.notes: Movieverse ORIGINAL character. Head of security for Arashikage clan. Played by Haruka Abe in Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins (2021). No ARAH equivalent

characters.name: Kenta
characters.notes: Movieverse ORIGINAL character. Arashikage exile and yakuza leader. Played by Takehiro Hira in Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins (2021). No ARAH equivalent

characters.name: Sen
characters.notes: Movieverse ORIGINAL character. Elder of the Arashikage clan. Played by Eri Ishida in Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins (2021). No ARAH equivalent

characters.name: Mouse
characters.notes: Movieverse ORIGINAL character. Young G.I. Joe tech specialist. Played by Joseph Mazzello in Retaliation (2013). No ARAH equivalent
